message:
feat: Add Metal/Accelerate support with comptime detection

- Auto-detect macOS at compile time using builtin.os.tag
- Link Metal, Foundation, Accelerate frameworks on macOS
- Add lanceql.metal module with:
  - vDSP-accelerated dot product (32 ns/op on M2)
  - vDSP-accelerated cosine similarity (72 ns/op)
  - SIMD L2 distance (15 ns/op)
  - Batch similarity: 14M vectors/sec (384-dim)
- Pure Zig SIMD fallback for non-macOS platforms
- Add bench-vector benchmark step
